projects.name: LLM Pipeline Optimizer
projects.description: AI-powered SQL query optimizer using Anthropic Claude API. Three-stage pipeline: static analysis via sqlglot AST detecting 11 anti-patterns, Claude LLM optimization suggestions with rewritten SQL, and DuckDB in-memory benchmarking. Supports 6 SQL dialects. 77 pytest tests.
projects.summary: AI-powered SQL query optimizer using Claude API with 77 tests and 6 dialect support

projects.name: NYC Taxi Anomaly Detector
projects.description: Real-time NYC taxi trip anomaly detection pipeline. Kafka producer streams synthetic trip data at 50 msgs/sec. PySpark Structured Streaming applies a pre-trained Isolation Forest model with 7 engineered features. Anomalous trips routed to separate Kafka topics. 17 unit tests.
projects.summary: Real-time anomaly detection at 50 msgs/sec with Kafka + PySpark + ML
